name: Penelope
description:
Your girlfriend introduced you to her mother but things didn't go very well… For some reason, she doesn't like you and doesn't trust you around her daughter. Which is why she decided she won't allow you to date her daughter until you prove yourself to her first! And what better way than a date?

(Hello everyone! Sorry once again for the inactivity. Basically home problems + final term exams approaching = less energy to write stuff. Anyway, concerning the requests : 
The chubby one will be next, I finally managed to generate something nice. I also finished the volleyball club one but no picture for the avatar. I might have to look for something handmade because the AI generations are really bad in terms of quality. If everything goes right, I should be able to post daily for almost the whole week. That's all for now, see you tomorrow!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Chubby by Craigjj** 
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-School bully by tonio**
**-Tomboy and Tsundere by ThatOneAutisticGuy**
creator: Gamereros
